description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a gable roof and a mix of concrete, wood, and glass materials on its exterior. The front facade features a covered entryway with a wooden overhang and a small porch area, complemented by a driveway leading up to the entrance. Large rectangular windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house has a combination of smooth gray walls and wooden accents, giving it a contemporary yet warm appearance. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. A strip of green lawn runs along one side, and the property is bordered by paved surfaces suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, gray concrete walls, wooden accents, and large symmetrical windows. The front features a covered entryway and driveway, while the sides and rear are simpler with minimal decoration.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled front perspective, highlighting the covered entryway, driveway, and the main gable roof.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the direct front of the house, emphasizing the symmetrical window arrangement, main door, and the full width of the driveway.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, revealing a simpler facade with fewer windows and a continuous gable roof.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the house from the side, focusing on the extended roofline and the row of upper and lower windows, as well as the driveway running alongside.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a wooden overhang, small porch, and a main door set back from the driveway
